name: SOC Response Playbook — Incident 5c496340-c1c0-45a8-92bb-876b71fd08e3
description:
Okay, here’s an analysis of the security alert, following your guidelines:

1.  **SUMMARY:** A lateral movement event has been detected originating from a compromised machine, likely utilizing SMB protocol, indicating a potential attack vector.

2.  **TECHNIQUE:** T1059 - Command Execution – The attacker is attempting to execute a command on the compromised system, potentially leveraging SMB to gain access to other resources.

3.  **ACTION:** QUARANTINE_FILE – Immediately isolate the source machine (192.168.1.33) to prevent further potential lateral movement and data exfiltration.

action--1.name: Alert Ingestion
action--1.description: System received new raw SIEM log
